---
title: "Person"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-person">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



[Titel] + [Personenname] + [Determinative] + [Epitheta]


## Titel


<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imi-rꜣ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/25550' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 25550' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 25550 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>25550</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/01_jmj-rA_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/01_jmj-rA_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Vorsteher </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥry*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/108310' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 108310' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 108310 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>108310</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/02_Hry_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Oberer </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imꜣḫ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/25090' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 25090' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 25090 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>25090</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/03_jmAx_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Ehrwürdiger / Versorgter </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb imꜣḫ*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/81950' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 81950' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 81950 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>81950</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/04_nb-jmAx_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr der Erwürdigkeit </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wsir*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/49461' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 49461' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 49461 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>49461</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/05_wsjr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/05_wsjr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/05_wsjr_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Osiris </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb.t pr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/82090' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 82090' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 82090 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>82090</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/f/01_nb.t-pr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herrin des Hauses </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥm.t-nṯr ḥw.t-ḥr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400979' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400979' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400979 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400979</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/f/02_Hm.t-nTr-Hw.t-Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Priesterin der Hathor </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥw.t-ḥr*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/99970' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 99970' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 99970 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>99970</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/f/02_Hw.t-Hr_Roem._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(röm.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hathor </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *šmꜥy.t-imn*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/884639' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 884639' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 884639 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>884639</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Titel/f/03_Smay.t-jmn_NR-3.Zw.Zt._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR; 3.Zw.Zt.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sängerin des Amun </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Personenname


wichtiges Bildungsmuster für weibliche Namen:


- *tꜣ-di-* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/f/01_tA-dj-Gottheit/01_tA-dj_01.png){.glyph} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/f/01_tA-dj-Gottheit/01_tA-dj_02.png){.glyph} + [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit}


wichtiges Bildungsmuster für männliche Namen:


- *pꜣ-di-* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/m/01_pA-dj-Gottheit/01_pA-dj_01.png){.glyph} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Namen/m/01_pA-dj-Gottheit/01_pA-dj_02.png){.glyph} + [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit}


## Determinative

<div class='tableFixHead table-fixed'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> männlich </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> weiblich </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/m/01_A1_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/m/02_A52_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/f/01_B1_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/f/02_B1G_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Personennamen/Determinative/f/03_B8_01.png){.glyph} </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Epitheta

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mꜣꜥ-ḫrw*<span class='table-inline-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/66750' class='tla-badge tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 66750' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 66750 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>66750</a></span></span> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_Spaet._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Menschenepitheta/03_mAa-xrw_Spaet._02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Gerechtfertigter </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Filiationsangabe


AR:


- [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} (= Vater) *sꜣ⸗f* [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} (= Sohn)


MR:


- [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} (= Vater) *sꜣ* [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} (= Sohn)


ab NR:


- [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} (= Sohn) *sꜣ* [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} (= Vater)


bei Töchtern: *sꜣ.t* „Tochter“( statt *sꜣ*)


bei Müttern im AR: *sꜣ⸗s*



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
